tr.th:
Free movement around the city
(Point A ↔ Point B ↔ Point C)
Renting a car in another city / country

ul.li: Spend pleasant time with friends and drive around the city;
Try different cars from different classes;
Get positive emotions from the trip.
Send or pick up a parcel;
Get to the office, home, a meeting, etc.;
Go shopping and bring groceries;
Replace their own car while it is at the service station.
Gain experience driving different cars;
Maintain already acquired driving skills.

td.p: Need a car under certain conditions:

ul.li: during an air-raid alert;
when curfew is approaching;
when they need to transport things;
pick someone up with bags;
go to a meeting.
Need fast movement within one city at a specific time; the simpler it is, the better.
A car must be available throughout the entire stay in another city.

tr.td:
Natural frequency
(compared on average per year based on user interviews)

Once / month
Yearly
(seasonality may affect it — favorable conditions are needed)

Once / 2 months
Yearly
(seasonality may affect it — favorable conditions are needed)

ul.li: Fast access to a variety of cars across the city;
Ability to find a car that matches specific requirements through filters;
No need to interact with unknown people;
No need to agree on pickup time — trip duration adjusts to the need.
Access to cars across the city with the ability to book and pause the trip while solving tasks at their own pace;
Ability to drive up to a building, office, garage, etc. to load or unload things.
Ability to independently control and adjust trip duration when needed;
Easy access to cars with relevant parameters, such as transmission and size.
Accessible search for the nearest car;
Predictable trip cost regardless of external conditions, such as alerts, late evening, or a trip downtown;
Ability to pick a car that matches the need.
Fast access to cars across the city with flexible parking zones;
Ability to book a car and pay per day rather than by the hour.

tr.td: Booked and took a spontaneous ride at least 2 times within the first 2 months and repeated this at least 3 times after installing the app.
Booked a car, reached several destinations, used pause during the trip, and completed at least 2 trips within one booking during the first month after installing the app.
Booked and practiced driving skills, reviewed trip statistics, and repeated this at least 2 times within 2 months after installing the app.
Booked a car and got from Point A to Point B at least 2 times within 6 months after installing the app.
Booked a car for several days and successfully used it during the entire reserved period, then repeated this cycle at least 2 times within 2 years.
